title: crepis glochidiata
intro: Crepis glochidiata, also known as Bristly Hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and stems are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Crepis glochidiata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with herbal preparations often used to treat digestive issues and other health problems.
